bp_source_breakdown_train_confirmed.source_breakdown: NOT_IN_CSV — source_file column not written to final output

dataset_lineage.label: DS-B (clean)
dataset_lineage.description: Full collected corpus — all available labelled data after noise removal
dataset_lineage.role: Starting point for all modelling. Establishes the full task distribution.
sources: Empathetic Dialogues (later removed after DS-B noisy)
quality_actions: Upgraded emotion/value vectors from class-level to per-sample (100% coverage)
dataset_lineage.dedup_leakage: No cross-split leakage check at this stage
dataset_lineage.notes: DS-B noisy (820K) was the intermediate; DS-B clean (814K) is the stable corpus used going forward.

dataset_lineage.label: DS-E (NLI-only)
dataset_lineage.description: NLI-filtered subset: only entailment/contradiction pairs retained
dataset_lineage.role: Key refinement: removed non-NLI rows that mapped polarity sentiment to YES/NO, corrupting the decision boundary. This was the biggest single F1 jump (+0.033).

train_class_dist.NOTE: Not separately confirmed — derived from NLI filter

sources: DS-B clean (NLI pairs subset only — SNLI/MultiNLI/SemEval NLI)
dataset_lineage.f1_impact: +0.033 vs DS-B (largest single-step improvement in programme)
dataset_lineage.notes: Volume reduction 814K→444K was intentional: better task fit, not data loss.

dataset_lineage.label: DS-F
dataset_lineage.role: Label quality pass. These were NLI pairs where hypothesis was clearly false (contradicted by premise) but had been labelled TBD. Correcting them sharpened the NO boundary.
dataset_lineage.notes: Production text+label baseline. All subsequent datasets share this text.

dataset_lineage.label: DS-G
dataset_lineage.description: DS-F text + diversity-corrected aux vectors (value dimension bug fix)
dataset_lineage.role: Corrected a value-vector dimension bug that caused collapsed diversity in the V10 head. Same texts and decision labels as DS-F.
dataset_lineage.notes: Text and decision labels unchanged from DS-F.

dataset_lineage.label: DS-J (canonical, read-only)
dataset_lineage.description: DS-G + hypothesis filter + correct value dims + emotion alignment fix. Final consolidated canonical dataset. Never alter.
dataset_lineage.role: Canonical dataset — all subsequent datasets build from DS-J CSVs. Val and test splits are permanently fixed here.
quality_actions: Hypothesis-only filter applied (removes trivially predictable pairs)
dataset_lineage.notes: Val=44,404 and Test=44,597 rows are the fixed evaluation splits for all subsequent stages including DS-L. DS-J train is the text/label base for DS-L train.

dataset_lineage.label: DS-L (current training set)
dataset_lineage.description: DS-J base + DS-K unique hard cases + capped reasoning/negation pattern boost. Masks: emotion_mask=0.0 (skip emotion supervision), value_mask=0.3 (weak).
dataset_lineage.role: Primary training dataset for S12 and S12B. Adds targeted hard cases (negation, numbers, role/value swaps) without the oversampling explosion of DS-K (which was rejected at 908K train rows).

train_composition.DS-K_unique_additions: confirmed in build log [NOT_STORED_LOCALLY — see build script]
train_composition.DS-K_capped_boost: up to 12,000 rows (boost_cap=12000 in build script)
train_composition.boost_distribution: YES=40%, NO=20%, TBD=40% of boost budget

dataset_lineage.notes: Val and test splits are identical to DS-J (build script writes dsj_val/dsj_test unchanged). Train is DS-J train + DS-K unique rows + capped boost (max 2 duplicates per text). Emotion head intentionally masked (emotion_mask=0) — E28 metrics skipped.

dataset_lineage.label: BP-S12 (boundary pack — correction only)
dataset_lineage.description: 323 training examples mined from S12 ep3 diagnostics. Used for 1 targeted sharpening epoch after S12 ep3 checkpoint.
dataset_lineage.role: Targeted correction of high-confidence boundary errors. NOT the primary training dataset — represents <0.1% of total training volume. Sourced from: high_conf_errors, hardest_examples, disagreement_audit from S12 ep3 5k-slice diagnostic run.
dataset_lineage.notes: S12B FULLVAL/FULLTEST evaluation was run against DS-L val/test (44,404/44,597 rows), NOT against the boundary pack val/test. The boundary pack val/test (500 rows each) were used only during the 1-epoch sharpening training run for checkpoint selection.
